---
title: "Fitting meta-analysis with `glmmTMB` package `equalto` covariance structure"
author: "Coralie Williams"
date: "Last compiled on `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: default
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---



# Tutorial 



# Case studies
